query:
WITH bad_debt_last_days AS (
  SELECT
    base.contract_no,
    base.section,
    base.last_paid_date,
    base.last_created_date,
    base.last_updated_by,
    CASE WHEN agg.primary_sum < 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_fallback
  FROM (
    SELECT
      inner_q.contract_no,
      inner_q.section,
      inner_q.last_paid_date,
      inner_q.last_created_date,
      inner_q.last_updated_by
    FROM (
      SELECT
        pt2.contract_no,
        pt2.section,
        DATE(pt2.paid_at) AS last_paid_date,
        DATE(pt2.created_at) AS last_created_date,
        pt2.updated_by AS last_updated_by,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
          PARTITION BY pt2.contract_no, pt2.section
          ORDER BY pt2.created_at DESC
        ) AS rn
      FROM payment_transactions pt2
      WHERE pt2.section = 'Fastfone365'
        AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt2.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
    ) inner_q
    WHERE inner_q.rn = 1
  ) base
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      pt3.contract_no,
      pt3.section,
      SUM(COALESCE(pt3.total, pt3.amount, 0)) AS primary_sum
    FROM payment_transactions pt3
    WHERE pt3.section = 'Fastfone365'
      AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt3.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
    GROUP BY pt3.contract_no, pt3.section, DATE(pt3.paid_at), DATE(pt3.created_at), pt3.updated_by
  ) agg ON agg.contract_no = base.contract_no
    AND agg.section = base.section
    AND DATE(agg.contract_no) = base.last_created_date
),
device_rows AS (
  SELECT
    pt.contract_no,
    DATE(pt.created_at) AS created_date,
    pt.updated_by,
    SUM(COALESCE(pt.total, pt.amount, 0)) AS amount
  FROM payment_transactions pt
  INNER JOIN contracts c ON c.contract_no = pt.contract_no AND c.section = pt.section
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
      base2.contract_no,
      base2.section,
      base2.last_paid_date,
      base2.last_created_date,
      base2.last_updated_by,
      CASE WHEN agg2.primary_sum < 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_fallback
    FROM (
      SELECT
        inner_q2.contract_no,
        inner_q2.section,
        inner_q2.last_paid_date,
        inner_q2.last_created_date,
        inner_q2.last_updated_by
      FROM (
        SELECT
          pt2.contract_no,
          pt2.section,
          DATE(pt2.paid_at) AS last_paid_date,
          DATE(pt2.created_at) AS last_created_date,
          pt2.updated_by AS last_updated_by,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY pt2.contract_no, pt2.section
            ORDER BY pt2.created_at DESC
          ) AS rn
        FROM payment_transactions pt2
        WHERE pt2.section = 'Fastfone365'
          AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt2.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
      ) inner_q2
      WHERE inner_q2.rn = 1
    ) base2
    LEFT JOIN (
      SELECT
        pt3.contract_no,
        pt3.section,
        DATE(pt3.paid_at) AS paid_date,
        DATE(pt3.created_at) AS created_date,
        pt3.updated_by,
        SUM(COALESCE(pt3.total, pt3.amount, 0)) AS primary_sum
      FROM payment_transactions pt3
      WHERE pt3.section = 'Fastfone365'
        AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt3.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
      GROUP BY pt3.contract_no, pt3.section, DATE(pt3.paid_at), DATE(pt3.created_at), pt3.updated_by
    ) agg2 ON agg2.contract_no = base2.contract_no
      AND agg2.section = base2.section
      AND agg2.created_date = base2.last_created_date
      AND agg2.updated_by = base2.last_updated_by
      AND agg2.paid_date = base2.last_paid_date
  ) bdl ON bdl.contract_no = pt.contract_no AND bdl.section = pt.section
  WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
    AND c.status = 'หนี้เสีย'
    AND DATE(pt.created_at) = bdl.last_created_date
    AND pt.updated_by = bdl.last_updated_by
    AND (
      DATE(pt.paid_at) = bdl.last_paid_date
      OR bdl.is_fallback = 1
    )
  GROUP BY pt.contract_no, DATE(pt.created_at), pt.updated_by
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_contracts,
  CAST(SUM(amount) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS total_amount
FROM device_rows;

          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

        FROM payment_transactions pt2
